text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper title is real and was published at MICCAI 2023, but the cited authors (H. Wang, X. Li, Q. Zhang) are completely wrong. The actual authors are Hu Wang, Congbo Ma, Jianpeng Zhang, Yuan Zhang, Jodie Avery, Louise Hull, and Gustavo Carneiro — none of the cited authors (X. Li, Q. Zhang) appear in the real author list, making this a classic "grafted" hallucination with a real title but fabricated authorship.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.01035
